regulations.title: Norwegian Carbon Tax Extension to Fisheries and Aquaculture
regulations.summary: Fuel consumption data for Q4 2025 submitted to CO2-avgift portal; Q1 payment preparation underway.

regulations.title: Norwegian Pollution Control Act Amendment
regulations.summary: Norconsult BNR system recommendation (NOK 11.8m) board-approved; plan submission 31 March 2026.

regulations.title: EU Packaging and Packaging Waste Regulation
regulations.summary: Omega-3 blister packs classified Class B in draft delegated act; Coveris redesign assessment commissioned.

regulations.title: EU Deforestation-free Products Regulation
regulations.summary: Skretting EUDR declaration received; Cargill declaration pending February 2026.

regulations.title: Norwegian Transparency Act
regulations.summary: Chilean hatchery §4 disclosure confirmed; on-site audit programme Q2 2026.

regulations.title: Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive
regulations.summary: ESRS gap analysis in progress; S2 hatchery audit aligned with CSRD S2 disclosure.
